creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
I have created a patch which can be downloaded from the following
location:

http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/xemacs21-port-patch

This patch does the following:

 - fix the PLIST to change a @dirrm to a @unexec rmdir >/dev/null || true
   to handle the case where the directory is not empty when the package is 
   removed.  This happens because the "xemacs-packages-1.0" package leaves
   its files in lib/xemacs, and because of the packages dependencies, the
   xemacs package must be deleted first.
 - when the --with-dialogs=athena option is used, add Xaw3d.6 to LIB_DEPENDS
 - include the --with-tiff option to configure, and add tiff.4 to LIB_DEPENDS

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
